ddls:
CREATE TABLE "armor_types" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of armor */,
  "armor_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the armor type */,
  "defense_rating" INTEGER /* Defense rating of the armor */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the armor */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set to which the armor belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  "cooldown_seconds" INTEGER /* Cooldown period of the ability in seconds */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the ability */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability's effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor type */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  "effect_value" TEXT /* Effect value (e.g., +5%, -10%) */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (Buff, Debuff, Resistance) */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_effects_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_effects_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES character_abilities ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class */,
  "current_armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currently equipped armor */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "total_quests_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of quests completed by the character */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* JSON array of achievements earned by the character */,
  "background_story" TEXT /* Background story of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_current_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "starting_abilities" TEXT /* JSON array of starting abilities for the class */,
  "class_attributes" TEXT /* JSON object of default attributes for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "total_characters" INTEGER /* Total number of characters the user has created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  "proficiency_level" INTEGER /* Proficiency level of the character in the ability */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the skill was last used */,
  "times_used" INTEGER /* Number of times the skill has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES character_abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (Solo, Party, PvP) */,
  "session_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the session (e.g., Adventure, Arena, Quest) */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session (e.g., Win, Loss, Incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Armor, Weapon) */,
  "equipped_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was equipped */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "item_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set to which the item belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipment_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "leader_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character leading the party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the party was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the party was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_leader_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party member */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the character joined the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_members_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Quest, PvP, Boss Battle) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "participants" TEXT /* JSON array of participants */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., Win, Loss, Incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_participants FOREIGN KEY ("participants") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
